message:
fix(handoff): clean up orphaned bead on pin failure in GetOrCreateHandoffBead

If the status update to "pinned" fails after bead creation, close the
orphaned bead to prevent duplicates on retry. FindHandoffBead only
searches pinned beads, so an un-pinned orphan would cause a retry to
create a second bead with the same title.

Fixes: gt-mvhssj.4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
